default_prompts: What can you help me with?
Give me a short summary of what you do.

adapters.name: City FAQ Assistant (SQLite)
prompts: What are the city's business hours?
How do I request a building permit?

prompts: How many employees are in the engineering department?

prompts: How many orders were placed last month?
What is the total revenue from customer orders?

adapters.name: Simple AI Chat (Web Search)
prompts: What's the latest news on AI regulation?
Who won the most recent World Cup?
